title: AttackAgain
description: Experience a new dimension of combat with enhanced attack mechanics and add more challenge to your battles!
body:
# Attack Again  
This mod introduces three new attributes for players.  

## **Features:**

- **Attack Probability**: Adds an attack probability attribute, allowing players to adjust the chance of a subsequent attack via the config file, ranging from 0 to 100.
- **Attack Damage**: Adjusts the damage percentage of the subsequent attack via the config file, affecting how additional damage is calculated.
- **Attack Frequency**: Controls the number of additional attacks.

## **Configuration Options:**

- **Attack Again Probability**: Determines the probability of a subsequent attack, ranging from 0 to 100.
- **Damage Percentage**: Percentage of additional attack damage.
- **Damage Frequency**: Frequency of additional attacks, controlling the time interval between attacks.
